PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Hines for Richard Rich (Administrator).

The Court found that sufficent evidence had been presented to rule that Phillip Rich is deceased. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The bond is set at $177,000.00.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: B. Mann.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2008 Continued To May-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
